raw.official description: Dynamite has a 40% increased detonation radius while airborne and refunds 6 ammo when thrown.
raw.ability details: * Successful air detonations play a louder sound effect.

raw.official description: Knocking an enemy back with Coach Gun briefly allows you to use it one extra time within 2 seconds.
Unscoped shots gain 30% increased attack speed, but deal 10% less damage.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
* Damage per second: 157.5 while firing (2.03 overall w/ full reload, 33.16 w/ reload after each shot)

raw.official description: After using Dynamite, pressing Ability 2 again causes it to explode after a 0.5 second delay.
raw.ability details: * Manual detonation can also trigger the increased explosion radius from ''Could not find 'Airburst' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.''.

raw.official description: Coach Gun pushes Ashe and enemies 12% farther.
raw.ability details: * Despite the description, only Ashe's knockback strength is affected.

raw.official description: Hitting 2 consecutive scoped shots on a target deals 25 extra damage.
raw.ability details:
* Applies a [[damage over time]] effect.
* The counter is reset if a scoped shot misses, hits another enemy or does not hit the target again within the next 3 seconds.
** Unscoped shots can be fired in between scoped shots and have no effect on the counter.
* The shot that applies Viper's Sting does not count toward the requirement, meaning that from 4 shots fired 2nd and 4th apply the effect.

abilities.name: Coach Gun

raw.shot type:

raw.official description: Blast enemies in front of you and knock yourself backwards.
raw.ability details: * During cast time, you can change the shot direction. * The bullets do not need to hit anything in order to apply the [[knockback]] to Ashe. * Can be used while [[rooted]] or [[hindered]], however it will only knock back the enemy and not Ashe. ** Being rooted, e.g. by [[File:Ability-Junkrat3.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Steel Trap|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Steel Trap|Steel Trap]], mid-air will interrupt the movement but being hindered does not.

raw.official description: Throw an explosive that detonates after a short delay or immediately when shot.
raw.damage:
50 - 20 (explosion, enemy)
100 over 5 seconds (burn, enemy)
25 - 10 (explosion, self)
50 over 5 seconds (burn, self)
raw.ability details: * Can be shot at with [[File:Ability-ashe1.png|middle|link=Ashe#The Viper|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#The Viper|The Viper]] or [[File:Ability-ashe3.png|sub|link=Ashe#Coach Gun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#Coach Gun|Coach Gun]] to detonate immediately. * The burn also affects [[barrier]]s and turrets. * The burn is a [[damage over time]] effect. It is removed immediately by [[phased out]] status, such as [[File:Protection_Suzu_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Protection Suzu|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Protection Suzu|Protection Suzu]], [[File:Ability-zarya2.png|sub|link=Zarya#Particle Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Particle Barrier|Personal/Projected Barrier]] or upon taking a [[Health Pack]]. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the explosion is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Explosion damage alone or a player with DoT going through is not amplified.

abilities.name: The Viper

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.reload time:
0.5 seconds (initial animation)
+0.25 seconds per bullet
3.5 seconds (full reload animation)
raw.dps: 136.5 while firing (63.86 overall w/ full reload, 34.78 w/ reload after each shot)
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 136.5 while firing (63.86 overall w/ full reload, 34.78 w/ reload after each shot)
* Ashe reloads The Viper one bullet at a time in rapid succession, instead of all at once.
** The more bullets fired, the longer it takes to fully reload. 
** If the reload is cancelled before completion, any bullets loaded will remain in the magazine, instead of none at all.
* Unlike most [[weapon]]s, The Viper is semi-automatic instead of fully automatic.
* Spread resets after 1.5 seconds since the last unscoped shot. Spread starts on the 3rd shot and reaches its maximum upon the 6th shot.
* Each shot raises the Ashe camera (changes the facing angle) by 1 unit.
* If after the shot you turn on the zoom and try to shoot, it will take at least 0.240 seconds.

3.5 seconds (full reload animation)

* Damage per second: 114 while firing (78.98 overall w/ full reload, 53.27 w/ reload after each shot)
* Ashe can jump while aiming down sights without interrupting it.
* After the shot, the game raises the Ashe camera (changes the facing angle) by 1 unit, after which it starts lowering the Ashe camera to its previous value. Unlike Cassidy, Ashe will not be able to shoot once the camera is back in position and will have to wait ~0.096 seconds.

abilities.name: B.O.B.
shot_type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee (charge) [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement (charge) [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan (arm cannon)

raw.shot type:
[[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee (charge)
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement (charge)
[[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan (arm cannon)
raw.official description: Deploy Bob. He charges forward and knocks enemies into the air, then attacks with his arm cannons.
raw.duration:
1.5 seconds (immobilize base)
0.5 seconds (immobilize flying)
4 seconds (charging)
10 seconds (after stopping)
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 136 while active ** B.O.B can deal a total of 1326 damage over the duration. * B.O.B. appears slightly to the right of Ashe and lands 5 meters in front of her, then charges in the direction Ashe is looking at. Once B.O.B. bumps into an enemy or a wall, or travels 65 meters, B.O.B. halts and begins shooting nearby enemies like a turret. ** If B.O.B. bumps into an enemy (or enemies), B.O.B. inflicts 120 damage to them and flings them into the air. ** If a charging B.O.B. collides with [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]], [[File:Rocket_punch.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Rocket Punch|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Rocket Punch|Rocket Punch]], [[File:Shield Bash.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Shield Bash|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Shield Bash|Shield Bash]], or another charging B.O.B., both participants get [[Crowd Control#Knock Down|knocked down]] for 1.7 seconds. ** B.O.B. automatically uses [[Symmetra]]'s [[File:Ability-symmetra4.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Teleporter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Teleporter|Teleporter]] if it's in his path. * Unlike other turrets, B.O.B. has spread, meaning if you are far away enough, not every single bullet will land, this is most noticeable at his max range. * B.O.B. prefers to target enemies that Ashe damages with her rifle. ** Otherwise, B.O.B.'s targeting most likely behaves the same as [[Torbjorn]]'s turret. * B.O.B. is treated as an additional player for most effects, such as contesting/capturing objectives or [[Wrecking Ball]]'s [[File:Adaptive_shield.png|sub|link=Wrecking Ball#Adaptive Shield|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Wrecking Ball#Adaptive Shield|Adaptive Shield]]. ** B.O.B. can be healed, buffed (e.g. [[File:Ability-ana4.png|sub|link=Ana#Nano Boost|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Nano Boost|Nano Boost]]), and debuffed (e.g. [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]]). *** If B.O.B. is hacked, B.O.B. becomes inactive for 3 seconds. ** Damaging or healing B.O.B. does not give [[Ultimate ability|ultimate charge]], but damage boosting as [[Mercy]] does. * B.O.B.'s charge cannot be blocked by [[barrier]]s, [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]] [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] or boosted by [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]], but the shots fired by him interact normally with all of the mentioned. * B.O.B.'s charge counts as a [[movement ability]], and is interrupted by [[rooted]] and [[hindered]]. * Damage amplification buffs on Ashe do not affect B.O.B., but he can be directly boosted by them. * Damage from B.O.B. applies the healing reduction from the [[File:Role Damage Circle.svg|sub|link=Roles#Role: Damage|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roles#Role: Damage|Role: Damage]] passive, as if he were a [[Damage]] hero. * B.O.B. does not receive the healing reduction from damage role passive when hit by a damage hero. * B.O.B. has the [[File:Role Tank Circle.svg|sub|link=Roles#Role: Tank|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roles#Role: Tank|Role: Tank]] passive and is considered a Tank in most regards. ** This includes receiving reduced critical/headshot damage, reduced knockback, reduced [[File:Ability-ana2.png|sub|link=Ana#Sleep Dart|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Sleep Dart|Sleep Dart]] duration, additional [[Hit points]] in Role Queue, etc.
